name: Catamaran Île aux Cerfs
sub: East Coast Cruise with BBQ Lunch
desc: Sail in style aboard a comfortable catamaran to the stunning Île aux Cerfs. Departing from Trou d'Eau Douce at 9:30am, cruise across the lagoon, visit the Grand River SE waterfall, snorkel over coral reefs, then enjoy BBQ lunch on board.
itin: Free time on Île aux Cerfs
notes: Price includes transport & BBQ lunch with unlimited drinks. Sharing catamaran.
